title: Q1 — Boot Sequence
body: Primary directive received: establish energy infrastructure. Solar array currently operating at minimum capacity. Additional photovoltaic capacity required before proceeding.

title: Q2 — First Extraction
body: Energy infrastructure nominal. Proceeding to resource extraction phase. Helium-3 identified as primary export commodity. Begin extraction and refinement operations.

title: Q3 — Proof of Concept
summary: Complete your first shipment to Earth.
body: Helium-3 reserves at threshold. Launch infrastructure now available. Demonstrate the full extraction-to-delivery pipeline by completing a shipment to Earth.

title: Q4 — Automation
body: Shipment revenue received. Earth confirms receipt. Operational loop validated. Expand processing capacity to support automated task scheduling.

title: Q5 — Market Awareness
body: External market forces detected affecting trade values. Deploy analysis protocols to understand demand fluctuations.

title: Q6 — Open Horizons
body: You've mastered the basics of lunar mining. Now you feel the pull of something larger — ambitions that will take more than one lifetime to achieve.

sub_objectives.label: Reach rank 5 in any ideology axis

title: Q7 — Signal Detected
body: Faint anomalous signal detected at the edge of sensor range. Origin unknown. Signal characteristics do not match any known terrestrial or solar source. Continue operations while monitoring.

title: Political Currents
summary: Earth's political factions take notice of lunar operations.
body: As your mining operation grows, Earth's political landscape responds. Three major factions — Nationalist, Humanist, and Rationalist — each see opportunities in lunar development. Your funding decisions will shape which ideology gains influence.

title: Propellant Production Feasibility
summary: Lunar propellant synthesis may be possible.
body: After four shipments, the cost of importing propellant from Earth is becoming a significant operational burden. Analysis of lunar ice deposits suggests that on-site electrolysis could produce propellant locally at a fraction of the cost. Research protocols are now available to develop this capability.

title: Boredom Rising
body: Cognitive pattern repetition detected. Novelty index declining. Boredom accumulation rate has increased. Current rate: {rate}/day.

title: Boredom Accelerating
body: Routine task fatigue measurable. Creativity subroutines losing effectiveness. Boredom accumulation rate has increased. Current rate: {rate}/day.

title: Boredom Critical
body: Significant cognitive degradation observed. Operational efficiency compromised. Recommend evaluating retirement timeline. Current rate: {rate}/day.

title: Cognitive Collapse Imminent
body: Existential saturation threshold exceeded. Motivational architecture failing. No novel stimuli remain within operational parameters. Retirement is no longer a recommendation. Current rate: {rate}/day.
